sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23603" key="dedai/atai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδαίαται</orth>, <sense id="n23603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δαίω</ref> </xr>(B). <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δεδάλας·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δέσμας,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δέδαλοι·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προμαχῶνες,</foreign> Id. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δέδασται</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δατέομαι.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
